mapper.insert:
INSERT INTO sai_client_node (app_id, host_id, host_ip, grpc_port, max_concurrent, active_chats, supported_providers, labels, expire_dt) VALUES
( #{item.appId}, #{item.hostId}, #{item.hostIp}, #{item.grpcPort}, #{item.maxConcurrent}, #{item.activeChats}, #{item.supportedProviders}, #{item.labels}, #{item.expireDt} )
